notes: Springtime druid focused on the recovery of blighted and barren lands. Travels with investigative teams to document and reverse environmental damage left behind by Weirding events.
personality: I speak to plants before I touch them. Every barren patch of earth is simply waiting for the right conditions — you have to listen before you can help.
ideals: Renewal. Every scorched field and every dead tree is a promise waiting to be kept. Nothing is truly gone until the last seed is gone.
bonds: A blight carved a scar through the heart of the Hurstwold years ago. I will not stop until that wound has healed, no matter how long it takes.
flaws: I can become so absorbed in a dying plant or blighted soil that I lose track of everything happening around me — including things that actually need my attention.

combat_tactics.role: Terrain controller and sustained healer. Petal wins fights by changing the conditions of the battlefield before the first sword is swung.

tactics.text: Entangle is the first priority: WIS save or restrained in a 20-foot square. Restrained creatures have 0 speed, disadvantage on attack rolls, and attacks against them have advantage. One well-placed Entangle turns a dangerous encounter into a cleanup operation. Center it on the densest cluster.

Maintain Entangle concentration. Cast Shillelagh as a bonus action (WIS for attack and damage, d8 instead of d6) to become a credible melee threat. Healing Word (bonus action) keeps injured allies standing without breaking concentration — a druid who heals with a bonus action and still attacks is efficient action economy.

Entangle and Barkskin are both concentration — never run both. Entangle helps the whole party and should run in almost every fight. Barkskin (AC 16) is the right call only when Petal must front-line alone or when terrain prevents clustering enemies. Choose deliberately at the start of each encounter.

Circle of the Land: Natural Recovery restores spell slots on a short rest (total levels up to half druid level). Budget 2nd-level slots for fights where Entangle must be upcast or Barkskin is needed. Lesser Restoration clears poisoned, blinded, paralyzed, or diseased conditions — hold at least one slot for it.
